    refine Integrable.finset_prod (s := Finset.univ) (fun k _ => ?_)
    have hIk := hI k (mem_univ k)

    have h1 : (I k).1 ∈ A := hIk.1
    have h2 : (I k).2 ∈ A := hIk.2
    have memLp1 := memLp_X (I k).1 h1

    have h2m_pos : (0 : ℝ≥0∞) < 2 * m := by
      cases m with
      | zero => simp only [CharP.cast_eq_zero, mul_zero]; exact le_refl _
      | succ n => simp only [Nat.cast_succ]; positivity
    have h2_le : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ 2 * m := by
      cases m with
      | zero => simp
      | succ n => 
        simp only [Nat.cast_succ]
        calc (2 : ℝ≥0∞) = 2 * 1 := by ring
          _ ≤ 2 * (↑n + 1) := by
            apply mul_le_mul_left'
            simp only [le_add_iff_nonneg_left, zero_le]
    have norm1_memLp : MemLp (fun ω => ‖X (I k).1 ω‖) 2 μ := by
      apply MemLp.mono_exponent (memLp1.norm) h2_le
    have norm2_memLp : MemLp (fun ω => ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) 2 μ := by
      apply MemLp.mono_exponent (memLp2.norm) h2_le
    exact (MemLp.mul_of_top_right norm1_memLp norm2_memLp.aestronglyMeasurable).integrable one_le_two

simp only [Fintype.mem_piFinset, mem_product] at hI
    by_cases hm : m = 0
    · simp [hm]
    · have h2m_pos : (0 : ℝ≥0∞) < 2 * m := by positivity
      refine Integrable.finset_prod (s := Finset.univ) ?_
      intro k _
      have h1 : (I k).1 ∈ A := (hI k).1
      have h2 : (I k).2 ∈ A := (hI k).2
      have memLp1 := memLp_X (I k).1 h1
      have memLp2 := memLp_X (I k).2 h2
      have : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) * m ≠ 0 := h2m_pos.ne'
      exact ((memLp1.norm_rpow this).mul (memLp2.norm_rpow this)).integrable (by norm_num)

simp only [Fintype.piFinset_product] at hI
    refine Integrable.finset_prod (s := Finset.univ) (fun k _ => ?_)
    have hIk := Finset.mem_pi.mp hI k (Finset.mem_univ k)
    simp only [Finset.mem_product] at hIk
    have h1 : MemLp (X (I k).1) (2 * m) μ := memLp_X _ hIk.1
    have h2 : MemLp (X (I k).2) (2 * m) μ := memLp_X _ hIk.2
    have hm : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) * m ≠ 0 := by
      simp only [ne_eq, mul_eq_zero, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, ENNReal.natCast_ne_zero, or_self,
        not_false_eq_true]
    by_cases hm0 : m = 0
    · simp [hm0]
    · have hpos : 0 < (2 : ℝ≥0∞) * m := by positivity
      have h1' : MemLp (fun ω => ‖X (I k).1 ω‖) (2 * m) μ := h1.norm
      have h2' : MemLp (fun ω => ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) (2 * m) μ := h2.norm
      have hadd : (2 * m : ℝ≥0∞)⁻¹ + (2 * m : ℝ≥0∞)⁻¹ ≤ 1 := by
        rw [← two_mul, ← ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul]
        apply ENNReal.div_le_one_of_le
        · exact le_refl _
        · exact hm
      exact (h1'.mul h2' hadd).integrable (by simp [hpos.ne'])
